system_name: Voice-Based Virtual Assistant for Multilingual Customer Support

peas.environment: Call centers, mobile applications, websites, multilingual users, varying noise conditions, internet and telecom networks

observability.justification: The assistant cannot fully observe customer intentions and emotions.

agents.justification: The system interacts with customers and human support agents.

determinism.justification: Speech variations and uncertainty can lead to different outcomes.

episodic_sequential.justification: Previous conversation context affects future decisions.

discrete_continuous.justification: Voice signals and speech patterns are continuous.
